workspaceId.description: The unique ID for the new workspace.

status.description: The current status of the new workspace. Immediately after you create the workspace, the status is usually CREATING.

tags.description: The list of tag keys and values that are associated with the workspace.

kmsKeyArn.description: (optional) If the workspace was created with a customer managed KMS key, the ARN for the key used.

configuration.description: The configuration file. Base 64 encoded. For more information, see Scraper configurationin the Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus User Guide.

scrapers.description: A list of ScraperSummary structures giving information about scrapers in the account that match the filters provided.

nextToken.description: A token indicating that there are more results to retrieve. You can use this token as part of your next ListScrapers operation to retrieve those results.

alias.description: (Optional) A name associated with the scraper.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the scraper.

roleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role that provides permissions for the scraper to discover and collect metrics on your behalf.

status.description: A structure that contains the current status of the scraper.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the scraper was created.

lastModifiedAt.description: The date and time that the scraper was last modified.

tags.description: (Optional) The list of tag keys and values associated with the scraper.

statusReason.description: If there is a failure, the reason for the failure.

source.description: The Amazon EKS cluster from which the scraper collects metrics.

destination.description: The Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus workspace the scraper sends metrics to.

roleConfiguration.description: This structure displays information about the IAM roles used for cross-account scraping configuration.

workspaces.description: An array of WorkspaceSummary structures containing information about the workspaces requested.

nextToken.description: A token indicating that there are more results to retrieve. You can use this token as part of your next ListWorkspaces request to retrieve those results.

alias.description: The alias that is assigned to this workspace to help identify it. It does not need to be unique.

status.description: The current status of the workspace.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the workspace was created.

tags.description: The list of tag keys and values that are associated with the workspace.

kmsKeyArn.description: (optional) If the workspace was created with a customer managed KMS key, the ARN for the key used.

status.description: A structure that displays the current status of the alert manager definition.

statusCode.description: The current status of the alert manager.

statusReason.description: If there is a failure, the reason for the failure.

anomalyDetectorId.description: The unique identifier of the created anomaly detector.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the created anomaly detector.

status.description: The status information of the created anomaly detector.

tags.description: The tags applied to the created anomaly detector.

statusCode.description: The status code of the anomaly detector.

statusReason.description: A description of the current status of the anomaly detector.

status.description: A structure that displays the current status of the logging configuration.

statusCode.description:
The current status of the current rules and alerting logging configuration.

These logging configurations are only for rules and alerting logs.

statusReason.description: If failed, the reason for the failure.

status.description: The current status of the query logging configuration.

statusCode.description: The current status of the query logging configuration.

statusReason.description: If there is a failure, the reason for the failure.

name.description: The name of the new rule groups namespace.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the new rule groups namespace.

status.description: A structure that returns the current status of the rule groups namespace.

tags.description: The list of tag keys and values that are associated with the namespace.

statusReason.description: The reason for the failure, if any.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the new scraper.

status.description: A structure that displays the current status of the scraper.

tags.description: The list of tag keys and values that are associated with the scraper.

scraperId.description: The ID of the scraper to delete.

status.description: The current status of the scraper.
A structure that displays the current status of the alert manager definition..

data.description:
The actual alert manager definition.

For details about the alert manager definition, see AlertManagedDefinitionData.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the alert manager definition was created.

modifiedAt.description: The date and time that the alert manager definition was most recently changed.

anomalyDetector.description: The detailed information about the anomaly detector.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the anomaly detector.

anomalyDetectorId.description: The unique identifier of the anomaly detector.

alias.description: The user-friendly name of the anomaly detector.

evaluationIntervalInSeconds.description: The frequency, in seconds, at which the anomaly detector evaluates metrics.

missingDataAction.description: The action taken when data is missing during evaluation.

configuration.description: The algorithm configuration of the anomaly detector.

labels.description: The Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus metric labels associated with the anomaly detector.

status.description: The current status of the anomaly detector.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the anomaly detector was created.

modifiedAt.description: The timestamp when the anomaly detector was last modified.

tags.description: The tags applied to the anomaly detector.

loggingConfiguration.description: A structure that displays the information about the logging configuration.

status.description: The current status of the logging configuration.

workspace.description: The ID of the workspace the logging configuration is for.

logGroupArn.description: The ARN of the CloudWatch log group to which the vended log data will be published.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the logging configuration was created.

modifiedAt.description: The date and time that the logging configuration was most recently changed.

queryLoggingConfiguration.description: The detailed information about the query logging configuration for the specified workspace.

status.description: The current status of the query logging configuration.

workspace.description: The ID of the workspace associated with this query logging configuration.

destinations.description: The configured destinations for the query logging configuration.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the query logging configuration was created.

modifiedAt.description: The date and time when the query logging configuration was last modified.

policyDocument.description: The JSON policy document for the resource-based policy attached to the workspace.

policyStatus.description: The current status of the resource-based policy.

revisionId.description: The revision ID of the current resource-based policy.

ruleGroupsNamespace.description: The information about the rule groups namespace.

arn.description: The ARN of the rule groups namespace. For example, arn:aws:aps:<region>:123456789012:rulegroupsnamespace/ws-example1-1234-abcd-5678-ef90abcd1234/rulesfile1.

name.description: The name of the rule groups namespace.

status.description: The current status of the rule groups namespace.

data.description:
The rule groups file used in the namespace.

For details about the rule groups namespace structure, see RuleGroupsNamespaceData.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the rule groups namespace was created.

modifiedAt.description: The date and time that the rule groups namespace was most recently changed.

tags.description: The list of tag keys and values that are associated with the rule groups namespace.

alias.description: (Optional) A name associated with the scraper.

scraperId.description: The ID of the scraper. For example, s-example1-1234-abcd-5678-ef9012abcd34.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the scraper. For example, arn:aws:aps:<region>:123456798012:scraper/s-example1-1234-abcd-5678-ef9012abcd34.

roleArn.description:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role that provides permissions for the scraper to discover and collect metrics on your behalf.

For example, arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/service-role/AmazonGrafanaServiceRole-12example.

status.description: A structure that contains the current status of the scraper.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the scraper was created.

lastModifiedAt.description: The date and time that the scraper was last modified.

tags.description: (Optional) The list of tag keys and values associated with the scraper.

statusReason.description: If there is a failure, the reason for the failure.

scrapeConfiguration.description: The configuration in use by the scraper.

source.description: The Amazon EKS cluster from which the scraper collects metrics.

destination.description: The Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus workspace the scraper sends metrics to.

roleConfiguration.description: This structure displays information about the IAM roles used for cross-account scraping configuration.

status.description: The status of the scraper logging configuration.

loggingDestination.description: The destination where scraper logs are sent.

scraperComponents.description: The list of scraper components configured for logging.

modifiedAt.description: The date and time when the logging configuration was last modified.

config.description: The configuration settings for the scraper component.

workspace.description: A structure that contains details about the workspace.

workspaceId.description: The unique ID for the workspace. For example, ws-example1-1234-abcd-5678-ef90abcd1234.

alias.description: The alias that is assigned to this workspace to help identify it. It does not need to be unique.

arn.description: The ARN of the workspace. For example, arn:aws:aps:<region>:123456789012:workspace/ws-example1-1234-abcd-5678-ef90abcd1234.

status.description: The current status of the workspace.

prometheusEndpoint.description: The Prometheus endpoint available for this workspace. For example, https://aps-workspaces.<region>.amazonaws.com/workspaces/ws-example1-1234-abcd-5678-ef90abcd1234/api/v1/.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the workspace was created.

tags.description: The list of tag keys and values that are associated with the workspace.

kmsKeyArn.description: (optional) If the workspace was created with a customer managed KMS key, the ARN for the key used.

workspaceConfiguration.description: This structure contains the information about the workspace configuration.

status.description: This structure displays the current status of the workspace configuration, and might also contain a reason for that status.

limitsPerLabelSet.description: This is an array of structures, where each structure displays one label sets for the workspace and the limits for that label set.

retentionPeriodInDays.description: This field displays how many days that metrics are retained in the workspace.

anomalyDetectors.description: The list of anomaly detectors in the workspace.

nextToken.description: The pagination token to retrieve the next set of results.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the anomaly detector.

anomalyDetectorId.description: The unique identifier of the anomaly detector.

alias.description: The user-friendly name of the anomaly detector.

status.description: The current status of the anomaly detector.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the anomaly detector was created.

modifiedAt.description: The timestamp when the anomaly detector was last modified.

tags.description: The tags applied to the anomaly detector.

ruleGroupsNamespaces.description: The returned list of rule groups namespaces.

nextToken.description: A token indicating that there are more results to retrieve. You can use this token as part of your next ListRuleGroupsNamespaces request to retrieve those results.

arn.description: The ARN of the rule groups namespace.

name.description: The name of the rule groups namespace.

status.description: A structure that displays the current status of the rule groups namespace.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the rule groups namespace was created.

modifiedAt.description: The date and time that the rule groups namespace was most recently changed.

tags.description: The list of tag keys and values that are associated with the rule groups namespace.
The list of tag keys and values associated with the resource.

status.description: A structure that returns the current status of the alert manager definition.

statusCode.description: The current status of the alert manager.

statusReason.description: If there is a failure, the reason for the failure.

anomalyDetectorId.description: The unique identifier of the updated anomaly detector.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the updated anomaly detector.

status.description: The status information of the updated anomaly detector.

tags.description: The tags applied to the updated anomaly detector.

statusCode.description: The status code of the anomaly detector.

statusReason.description: A description of the current status of the anomaly detector.

policyStatus.description: The current status of the resource-based policy.

revisionId.description: The revision ID of the newly created or updated resource-based policy.

name.description: The name of the rule groups namespace that was updated.

arn.description: The ARN of the rule groups namespace.

status.description: A structure that includes the current status of the rule groups namespace.

tags.description: The list of tag keys and values that are associated with the namespace.

statusReason.description: The reason for the failure, if any.

status.description: A structure that contains the current status of the logging configuration.

statusCode.description:
The current status of the current rules and alerting logging configuration.

These logging configurations are only for rules and alerting logs.

statusReason.description: If failed, the reason for the failure.

status.description: The current status of the query logging configuration.

statusCode.description: The current status of the query logging configuration.

statusReason.description: If there is a failure, the reason for the failure.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the updated scraper.

status.description: A structure that displays the current status of the scraper.

tags.description: The list of tag keys and values that are associated with the scraper.

status.description: The status of the updated scraper logging configuration.

statusCode.description: The status code of the scraper logging configuration.

statusReason.description: The reason for the current status of the scraper logging configuration.

status.description: The status of the workspace configuration.

statusCode.description: The current status of the workspace configuration.

statusReason.description: The reason for the current status, if a reason is available.
